response.justification: Exceeds the 15-year experience minimum with diverse technical background and current AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq. However, the resume emphasizes builder and technical IC roles rather than the strategic advisory and director-level decision-making this Principal Engineer role requires. The AI expertise is present but not at the recognized depth or scope suggested for advising strategic customers and shaping organizational cloud/AI vision.
strengths: 19 years of engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and systems with demonstrated progression to staff-level positions
Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, showing active engagement with AI/ML space
Strong teaching and mentoring background with ability to communicate complex technical concepts to diverse audiences
concerns: No demonstrated experience advising strategic customers or partners on cloud/AI adoption
AI expertise is emerging and recent—current role started April 2025 with limited evidence of depth or recognized AI product/platform contributions
Resume positions candidate as technical builder rather than director-level strategist driving organizational AI/cloud vision and identifying future product states

key_factors.factor: Strategic customer advisory and director-level scope gap
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work shows emerging relevance
